test.observation: Bench 128 steps: 56.58 tok/s (17.67 ms/tok). C dispatch is active with fused QKV kernel loaded. No fallback to Python dispatch.

typecheck.observation: No typecheck tool configured for this project

lint.observation: No lint tool configured for this project

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add rule: When modifying C structs that have Python ctypes mirrors (e.g., CEngineLayerSpec in c_dispatch.c and tp_engine.py), workers must update BOTH the C struct and the Python struct definition in the same commit. Field order must match exactly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fused-qkv-kernel feature (commit 79ec40a) added gemv_qkv_fused to c_dispatch.c CEngineLayerSpec but forgot to add it to tp_engine.py CEngineLayerSpec, causing a 56-byte struct size mismatch (C=1104, Python=1048). This broke C dispatch entirely, causing fallback to slow Python dispatch (~15 tok/s instead of ~54 tok/s).
